clusterWarnings: Fragment-pivot negations recur across harbor, crossing, and approach beats.

findings.line: Not enough to fall. Enough to show how close she had come.
findings.deletionTest: Enough to show how close she had come.
findings.reason: The second fragment carries the meaning on its own, so the negated setup is dead scaffolding.
findings.suggestedFix: The stumble showed how close she had come.

findings.line: Not a full spell. A narrow probe, frost-thin, slipped into the wind the way she might test a ward seam with two fingers.
findings.deletionTest: A narrow probe, frost-thin, slipped into the wind the way she might test a ward seam with two fingers.
findings.reason: The positive clause already states the real action, making the negated fragment removable scaffolding.
findings.suggestedFix: A narrow probe, frost-thin, slipped into the wind the way she might test a ward seam with two fingers.

findings.line: Not revelation. Recognition from a distance.
findings.reason: The affirmative fragment survives intact, so the negated opener is unnecessary contrast scaffolding.

audits.dominantPattern: Pattern 5 — Objects or abstractions carrying agency
clusterFlags: Smart analytical interiority in the crossing/approach carries multiple abstraction-as-agent compressions.
audits.extraSweep: Completed the pass-a P5/P6 second sweep for inanimate or abstract subjects carrying cognition or physical-behavior verbs.

findings.line: North was no longer direction. North had noticed.
findings.subject: North
findings.realAgent: The hostile source ahead reacting to Jaina's probe
findings.reason: Pattern 5: the sentence launders the source's awareness onto an abstract direction.
findings.suggestedFix: North was no longer direction. The source had noticed them.

findings.line: Northrend did not rise from the sea. It waited in it.
findings.subject: Northrend
findings.realAgent: Jaina's perception of the coastline as a looming, static landmass
findings.reason: Pattern 5: the coastline is given patient intent instead of being described as the visible landmass ahead.
findings.suggestedFix: Northrend stood ahead in the sea.

findings.line: The wood said it. The burned hull said it. The emptied camp edge and the crust over old boot marks said it.
findings.subject: The wood / the burned hull / the emptied camp edge / the crust over old boot marks
findings.realAgent: The accumulated physical evidence Jaina is reading to judge how long Arthas stayed
findings.reason: Pattern 2/6 hybrid: physical evidence is made to speak instead of the sentence naming the conclusion the signs support.
findings.suggestedFix: Taken together, the wood, the burned hull, the emptied camp edge, and the crust over old boot marks made the timing plain.

findings.line: Cyndia's mouth twitched. "If you like, I can call her someone else's."
findings.reason: This is the weaker of the chapter's two mouth-twitch beats, so it is the excess instance over the hard cap.
findings.suggestedFix: Cyndia almost smiled. "If you like, I can call her someone else's."

summary.verdictReason: Fail: pass A found more than three mild KILLs (7) even though every finding has a clean suggested fix.
